docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $950.00 FILED BY ZERNIK, GLORIA E. AS TO DEFENDANT BATSHON, DEEB(FATHER)DBA EDDIE'S AUTO CARE SERVICE BATSHON, NAJ (SON) EDDIE'S UNION 76 SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
